user.title: UDP Lyrics Player
user.description: Set up a Sendspin player that forwards audio over UDP.

data_description.sendspin_server_url: WebSocket URL of the Sendspin server (ws:// or wss://)
data_description.udp_host: IP address or hostname to send audio to

error.invalid_ws_url: URL must start with ws:// or wss://
error.invalid_host: A valid IP address or hostname is required
error.name_exists: A player with this name already exists
